findings.summary: The checkout overview page provides a clear breakdown of costs and items but suffers from significant trust gaps due to the use of placeholder text and a lack of visual product confirmation during the final purchase step.

findings.title: Placeholder Trust Gaps
findings.issue: Critical payment and shipping fields use obvious placeholder or 'joke' text.
findings.impact: Reduces user confidence and professional credibility at the most sensitive stage of the conversion funnel.
findings.evidence: The page displays 'SauceCard #31337' for payment and 'Free Pony Express Delivery!' for shipping information.

findings.title: Missing Product Visuals
findings.issue: The order summary lacks product thumbnail images.
findings.impact: Forces users to rely solely on text descriptions to verify their order accuracy, increasing cognitive load and the risk of errors.
findings.evidence: The item entry for the 'Sauce Labs Backpack' contains only a quantity, title, and text description.

findings.title: Ambiguous Secondary Action
findings.issue: The 'Cancel' button is visually styled with a back arrow, creating confusion about its destination.
findings.impact: Users may be hesitant to click it, fearing it will wipe their entire session/cart rather than simply returning them to the previous step.
findings.evidence: A 'Cancel' button with a left-facing arrow is positioned opposite the 'Finish' button.

findings.title: Suboptimal Price Layout
findings.issue: Individual item pricing is nested under the description rather than aligned in its own column.
findings.impact: Makes it difficult for users to quickly scan and reconcile line items against the 'Price Total' section at the bottom.
findings.evidence: The price '$29.99' is left-aligned directly beneath the product description text block.
